turns.svg:
<svg width="512" height="512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <!-- Car Body -->
  <rect x="50" y="220" width="412" height="110" rx="25" fill="#607D8B" stroke="black" stroke-width="2"/>
  <!-- Car Cabin -->
  <rect x="150" y="120" width="212" height="100" rx="15" fill="#90A4AE" stroke="black" stroke-width="2"/>

  <!-- Front Wheel -->
  <circle cx="150" cy="330" r="40" fill="#212121" stroke="black" stroke-width="2"/>
  <!-- Rear Wheel -->
  <circle cx="360" cy="330" r="40" fill="#212121" stroke="black" stroke-width="2"/>

  <!-- Front Windshield -->
  <polygon points="150,120 180,220 220,220 200,120" fill="#CFD8DC" stroke="black" stroke-width="2"/>
  <!-- Rear Window -->
  <polygon points="320,220 360,220 372,120 340,120" fill="#CFD8DC" stroke="black" stroke-width="2"/>
  <!-- Side Window -->
  <rect x="230" y="130" width="80" height="70" fill="#CFD8DC" stroke="black" stroke-width="2"/>
</svg>

<svg width="512" height="512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <!-- Background stars -->
  <circle cx="50" cy="50" r="2" fill="white"/>
  <circle cx="120" cy="180" r="2" fill="white"/>
  <circle cx="300" cy="100" r="2" fill="white"/>
  <circle cx="450" cy="300" r="2" fill="white"/>
  <circle cx="200" cy="400" r="2" fill="white"/>
  <circle cx="400" cy="450" r="2" fill="white"/>
  <circle cx="80" cy="350" r="2" fill="white"/>
  <circle cx="480" cy="150" r="2" fill="white"/>
  <circle cx="350" cy="480" r="2" fill="white"/>
  <circle cx="100" cy="250" r="2" fill="white"/>
  <circle cx="420" cy="80" r="2" fill="white"/>
  <circle cx="250" cy="40" r="2" fill="white"/>
  <circle cx="500" cy="400" r="2" fill="white"/>
  <circle cx="150" cy="480" r="2" fill="white"/>
  <circle cx="30" cy="300" r="2" fill="white"/>

  <!-- Mars planet -->
  <circle cx="256" cy="256" r="150" fill="#C1440E"/>

  <!-- Surface features -->
  <!-- Darker region 1 -->
  <ellipse cx="220" cy="200" rx="70" ry="40" fill="#8B3200" transform="rotate(-30 220 200)"/>
  <!-- Darker region 2 -->
  <ellipse cx="300" cy="320" rx="50" ry="30" fill="#8B3200" transform="rotate(20 300 320)"/>
  <!-- Lighter region (ice cap) -->
  <ellipse cx="180" cy="150" rx="30" ry="20" fill="#E08B60"/>
  <!-- A small crater -->
  <circle cx="380" cy="180" r="15" fill="#8B3200" opacity="0.7"/>
</svg>

<svg width="512" height="512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <rect x="0" y="0" width="512" height="384" fill="#87CEEB" /> <!-- Sky blue -->
  <rect x="0" y="384" width="512" height="128" fill="#556B2F" /> <!-- Darker green ground -->

  <!-- Tree 1 (Left) -->
  <rect x="80" y="280" width="40" height="104" fill="#8B4513" /> <!-- Trunk -->
  <circle cx="100" cy="230" r="50" fill="#228B22" /> <!-- Canopy -->

  <!-- Tree 2 (Center) -->
  <rect x="236" y="250" width="40" height="134" fill="#8B4513" /> <!-- Trunk -->
  <circle cx="256" cy="200" r="60" fill="#228B22" /> <!-- Canopy -->

  <!-- Tree 3 (Right) -->
  <rect x="392" y="300" width="40" height="84" fill="#8B4513" /> <!-- Trunk -->
  <circle cx="412" cy="250" r="40" fill="#228B22" /> <!-- Canopy -->

  <!-- Bush (Far Right) -->
  <circle cx="470" cy="350" r="30" fill="#2E8B57" /> <!-- Sea Green -->
</svg>

<svg width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <!-- Ear shape representing listening/receiving a whisper -->
  <path d="M 180 150 Q 150 180 150 200 Q 150 220 180 250 Q 210 220 210 200 Q 210 180 180 150 Z" fill="#E0E0E0" stroke="#A0A0A0" stroke-width="2"/>
  <path d="M 170 170 Q 160 185 160 200 Q 160 215 170 230" fill="none" stroke="#A0A0A0" stroke-width="2"/>
  <path d="M 180 240 Q 190 245 195 240" fill="#E0E0E0" stroke="#A0A0A0" stroke-width="2"/>

  <!-- Subtle sound waves indicating a whisper -->
  <path d="M 160 200 Q 180 180 200 200 Q 220 220 240 200" stroke="#B0C4DE" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none" opacity="0.6"/>
  <path d="M 160 200 Q 180 190 200 200 Q 220 210 240 200" stroke="#B0C4DE" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none" opacity="0.6"/>
  <path d="M 160 200 Q 180 210 200 200 Q 220 190 240 200" stroke="#B0C4DE" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none" opacity="0.6"/>
</svg>

<svg width="512" height="512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle cx="256" cy="150" r="40" stroke="black" stroke-width="2" fill="none"/><circle cx="236" cy="140" r="15" fill="black"/><circle cx="276" cy="140" r="15" fill="black"/><line x1="240" y1="170" x2="270" y2="170" stroke="black" stroke-width="3"/><line x1="256" cy="190" x2="256" y2="300" stroke="black" stroke-width="5"/><line x1="256" y1="230" x2="200" y2="250" stroke="black" stroke-width="4"/><line x1="256" y1="232" x2="198" y2="252" stroke="black" stroke-width="4"/><line x1="256" y1="228" x2="202" y2="248" stroke="black" stroke-width="4"/><line x1="256" y1="230" x2="310" y2="250" stroke="black" stroke-width="4"/><line x1="256" y1="232" x2="312" y2="252" stroke="black" stroke-width="4"/><line x1="256" y1="228" x2="308" y2="248" stroke="black" stroke-width="4"/><line x1="256" y1="300" x2="230" y2="380" stroke="black" stroke-width="4"/><line x1="256" y1="302" x2="228" y2="382" stroke="black" stroke-width="4"/><line x1="256" y1="298" x2="232" y2="378" stroke="black" stroke-width="4"/><line x1="256" y1="300" x2="280" y2="380" stroke="black" stroke-width="4"/><line x1="256" y1="302" x2="282" y2="382" stroke="black" stroke-width="4"/><line x1="256" y1="298" x2="278" y2="378" stroke="black" stroke-width="4"/><circle cx="220" cy="120" r="5" fill="#cccccc"/><circle cx="290" cy="120" r="5" fill="#cccccc"/><circle cx="256" cy="110" r="5" fill="#cccccc"/><circle cx="230" cy="140" r="5" fill="#cccccc"/><circle cx="280" cy="140" r="5" fill="#cccccc"/></svg>

<svg width="512" height="512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <rect width="512" height="512" fill="#334455"/>
  <path d="M 0 150 C 50 50, 150 50, 250 100 C 350 50, 450 50, 500 150 C 480 200, 400 250, 300 250 C 250 250, 200 250, 150 200 C 100 200, 50 200, 0 150 Z" fill="#556677"/>
  <path d="M 250 100 L 270 160 L 250 220 L 280 280 L 260 340 L 280 400 L 260 460 L 250 480" stroke="white" stroke-width="12" fill="none"/>
  <circle cx="250" cy="480" r="40" stroke="white" stroke-width="3" fill="none" opacity="0.8"/>
  <circle cx="250" cy="480" r="80" stroke="white" stroke-width="2" fill="none" opacity="0.7"/>
  <circle cx="250" cy="480" r="120" stroke="white" stroke-width="1" fill="none" opacity="0.6"/>
</svg>

<svg width="512" height="512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <rect width="100%" height="100%" fill="#1a1a2e"/>
  <g>
    <rect x="216" y="150" width="80" height="200" fill="#cccccc"/>
    <polygon points="216,150 296,150 256,90" fill="#aaaaaa"/>
    <polygon points="216,350 176,410 216,410" fill="#cccccc"/>
    <polygon points="296,350 336,410 296,410" fill="#cccccc"/>
    <polygon points="240,350 272,350 256,450" fill="#ff0000"/>
    <polygon points="230,350 282,350 256,430" fill="#ff8800"/>
    <polygon points="220,350 292,350 256,410" fill="#ffff00"/>
  </g>
</svg>

<svg width="512" height="512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <!-- Sky -->
  <rect x="0" y="0" width="512" height="150" fill="#87CEEB"/>
  <!-- Ground -->
  <rect x="0" y="150" width="512" height="362" fill="#8B4513"/>

  <!-- Wheat stalks -->
  <!-- Stalk 1 -->
  <g transform="translate(100, 200)">
    <line x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="150" stroke="#A0522D" stroke-width="4"/> <!-- Stem -->
    <!-- Wheat head -->
    <g transform="translate(0, -10)">
      <rect x="-5" y="0" width="10" height="3" fill="#DAA520"/>
      <rect x="-4" y="-5" width="8" height="3" fill="#DAA520"/>
      <rect x="-3" y="-10" width="6" height="3" fill="#DAA520"/>
      <rect x="-2" y="-15" width="4" height="3" fill="#DAA520"/>
    </g>
  </g>
  <!-- Stalk 2 -->
  <g transform="translate(150, 180)">
    <line x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="170" stroke="#A0522D" stroke-width="4"/>
    <g transform="translate(0, -10)">
      <rect x="-6" y="0" width="12" height="3" fill="#DAA520"/>
      <rect x="-5" y="-5" width="10" height="3" fill="#DAA520"/>
      <rect x="-4" y="-10" width="8" height="3" fill="#DAA520"/>
      <rect x="-3" y="-15" width="6" height="3" fill="#DAA520"/>
      <rect x="-2" y="-20" width="4" height="3" fill="#DAA520"/>
    </g>
  </g>
  <!-- Stalk 3 -->
  <g transform="translate(200, 220)">
    <line x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="130" stroke="#A0522D" stroke-width="4"/>
    <g transform="translate(0, -10)">
      <rect x="-4" y="0" width="8" height="3" fill="#DAA520"/>
      <rect x="-3" y="-5" width="6" height="3" fill="#DAA520"/>
      <rect x="-2" y="-10" width="4" height="3" fill="#DAA520"/>
      <rect x="-1" y="-15" width="2" height="3" fill="#DAA520"/>
    </g>
  </g>
  <!-- Stalk 4 -->
  <g transform="translate(250, 190)">
    <line x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="160" stroke="#A0522D" stroke-width="4"/>
    <g transform="translate(0, -10)">
      <rect x="-5" y="0" width="10" height="3" fill="#DAA520"/>
      <rect x="-4" y="-5" width="8" height="3" fill="#DAA520"/>
      <rect x="-3" y="-10" width="6" height="3" fill="#DAA520"/>
      <rect x="-2" y="-15" width="4" height="3" fill="#DAA520"/>
      <rect x="-1" y="-20" width="2" height="3" fill="#DAA520"/>
    </g>
  </g>
  <!-- Stalk 5 -->
  <g transform="translate(300, 210)">
    <line x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="140" stroke="#A0522D" stroke-width="4"/>
    <g transform="translate(0, -10)">
      <rect x="-4" y="0" width="8" height="3" fill="#DAA520"/>
      <rect x="-3" y="-5" width="6" height="3" fill="#DAA520"/>
      <rect x="-2" y="-10" width="4" height="3" fill="#DAA520"/>
      <rect x="-1" y="-15" width="2" height="3" fill="#DAA520"/>
    </g>
  </g>
  <!-- Stalk 6 -->
  <g transform="translate(350, 170)">
    <line x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="180" stroke="#A0522D" stroke-width="4"/>
    <g transform="translate(0, -10)">
      <rect x="-6" y="0" width="12" height="3" fill="#DAA520"/>
      <rect x="-5" y="-5" width="10" height="3" fill="#DAA520"/>
      <rect x="-4" y="-10" width="8" height="3" fill="#DAA520"/>
      <rect x="-3" y="-15" width="6" height="3" fill="#DAA520"/>
      <rect x="-2" y="-20" width="4" height="3" fill="#DAA520"/>
      <rect x="-1" y="-25" width="2" height="3" fill="#DAA520"/>
    </g>
  </g>
  <!-- Stalk 7 -->
  <g transform="translate(400, 200)">
    <line x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="150" stroke="#A0522D" stroke-width="4"/>
    <g transform="translate(0, -10)">
      <rect x="-5" y="0" width="10" height="3" fill="#DAA520"/>
      <rect x="-4" y="-5" width="8" height="3" fill="#DAA520"/>
      <rect x="-3" y="-10" width="6" height="3" fill="#DAA520"/>
      <rect x="-2" y="-15" width="4" height="3" fill="#DAA520"/>
    </g>
  </g>
  <!-- Stalk 8 -->
  <g transform="translate(450, 180)">
    <line x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="170" stroke="#A0522D" stroke-width="4"/>
    <g transform="translate(0, -10)">
      <rect x="-6" y="0" width="12" height="3" fill="#DAA520"/>
      <rect x="-5" y="-5" width="10" height="3" fill="#DAA520"/>
      <rect x="-4" y="-10" width="8" height="3" fill="#DAA520"/>
      <rect x="-3" y="-15" width="6" height="3" fill="#DAA520"/>
      <rect x="-2" y="-20" width="4" height="3" fill="#DAA520"/>
    </g>
  </g>
  <!-- Stalk 9 -->
  <g transform="translate(50, 190)">
    <line x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="160" stroke="#A0522D" stroke-width="4"/>
    <g transform="translate(0, -10)">
      <rect x="-5" y="0" width="10" height="3" fill="#DAA520"/>
      <rect x="-4" y="-5" width="8" height="3" fill="#DAA520"/>
      <rect x="-3" y="-10" width="6" height="3" fill="#DAA520"/>
      <rect x="-2" y="-15" width="4" height="3" fill="#DAA520"/>
      <rect x="-1" y="-20" width="2" height="3" fill="#DAA520"/>
    </g>
  </g>

  <!-- Sun -->
  <circle cx="450" cy="80" r="30" fill="#FFD700"/>
  <circle cx="450" cy="80" r="25" fill="#FFEC8B"/>

</svg>

<svg width="512" height="512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <path d="M 50 480 Q 150 300, 250 400 Q 350 500, 450 350 Q 400 200, 300 100 Q 200 50, 400 50" stroke="black" stroke-width="5" fill="none" />
  <circle cx="400" cy="50" r="10" fill="black" />
</svg>

<svg width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <!-- Stylized face representing a bitter or sour expression -->
  <circle cx="256" cy="256" r="120" fill="#FFDA63" stroke="#000000" stroke-width="5"/>
  <path d="M 220 220 Q 256 200 292 220" stroke="#000000" stroke-width="8" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <path d="M 220 280 Q 256 310 292 280" stroke="#000000" stroke-width="8" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
</svg>

<svg width="512" height="512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect x="50" y="50" width="412" height="412" rx="60" ry="60" fill="#FF0000"/><polygon points="376,256 136,166 136,346" fill="#FFFFFF"/></svg>

<svg width="512" height="512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect x="0" y="0" width="512" height="256" fill="#87CEEB"/><rect x="0" y="256" width="512" height="256" fill="#32CD32"/><rect x="300" y="280" width="20" height="150" fill="#8B4513"/><rect x="280" y="230" width="60" height="30" fill="#D3D3D3"/><rect x="260" y="240" width="20" height="50" fill="#D3D3D3"/><rect x="340" y="240" width="20" height="50" fill="#D3D3D3"/><rect x="125" y="180" width="150" height="150" fill="#228B22"/><rect x="150" y="200" width="50" height="50" fill="#000000"/><rect x="250" y="200" width="50" height="50" fill="#000000"/><rect x="175" y="230" width="100" height="50" fill="#000000"/><rect x="175" y="280" width="50" height="50" fill="#000000"/><rect x="275" y="280" width="50" height="50" fill="#000000"/></svg>

<svg width="512" height="512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <circle cx="256" cy="300" r="80" fill="#FFD700" />
  <circle cx="246" cy="270" r="80" fill="#DAA520" />
  <circle cx="236" cy="240" r="80" fill="#B8860B" />
</svg>

<svg width="512" height="512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <!-- Background -->
  <rect width="512" height="512" fill="#87CEEB"/>

  <!-- Mount Fuji -->
  <polygon points="30,350 330,350 180,100" fill="#A9A9A9"/>
  <polygon points="100,350 280,350 180,150" fill="#FFFFFF"/>

  <!-- Torii Gate -->
  <rect x="200" y="280" width="112" height="20" fill="#DC143C"/>
  <rect x="200" y="300" width="20" height="120" fill="#DC143C"/>
  <rect x="292" y="300" width="20" height="120" fill="#DC143C"/>

  <!-- Tokyo Tower/Skytree -->
  <path d="M 370 350 L 410 350 L 400 100 L 380 100 Z" fill="#DC143C"/>
  <rect x="385" y="80" width="20" height="50" fill="#FFFFFF"/>

  <!-- Cherry Blossoms -->
  <circle cx="80" cy="150" r="10" fill="#FF69B4"/>
  <circle cx="100" cy="170" r="8" fill="#FF69B4"/>
  <circle cx="450" cy="180" r="12" fill="#FF69B4"/>
  <circle cx="470" cy="200" r="8" fill="#FF69B4"/>
  <circle cx="150" cy="100" r="9" fill="#FF69B4"/>
  <circle cx="350" cy="120" r="7" fill="#FF69B4"/>
</svg>

<svg width="512" height="512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <rect width="100%" height="100%" fill="white"/>
  <circle cx="256" cy="256" r="70" fill="yellow"/>
  <line x1="256" y1="256" x2="476" y2="256" stroke="orange" stroke-width="20" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <line x1="256" y1="256" x2="412" y2="412" stroke="gold" stroke-width="20" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <line x1="256" y1="256" x2="256" y2="476" stroke="green" stroke-width="20" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <line x1="256" y1="256" x2="101" y2="412" stroke="cyan" stroke-width="20" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <line x1="256" y1="256" x2="36" y2="256" stroke="blue" stroke-width="20" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <line x1="256" y1="256" x2="101" y2="101" stroke="magenta" stroke-width="20" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <line x1="256" y1="256" x2="256" y2="36" stroke="red" stroke-width="20" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <line x1="256" y1="256" x2="412" y2="101" stroke="purple" stroke-width="20" stroke-linecap="round"/>
</svg>

<svg width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <!-- Ground -->
  <rect x="0" y="480" width="512" height="32" fill="#8B4513"/>

  <!-- Building Blocks -->
  <!-- Layer 1 -->
  <rect x="150" y="400" width="80" height="80" fill="#A0522D"/>
  <rect x="230" y="400" width="80" height="80" fill="#A0522D"/>
  <rect x="310" y="400" width="80" height="80" fill="#A0522D"/>

  <!-- Layer 2 -->
  <rect x="190" y="320" width="80" height="80" fill="#D2691E"/>
  <rect x="270" y="320" width="80" height="80" fill="#D2691E"/>

  <!-- Layer 3 -->
  <rect x="230" y="240" width="80" height="80" fill="#DAA520"/>

  <!-- Crane -->
  <!-- Mast -->
  <rect x="50" y="200" width="30" height="280" fill="#696969"/>
  <!-- Arm -->
  <rect x="80" y="220" width="200" height="20" fill="#696969"/>
  <!-- Hook -->
  <circle cx="280" cy="230" r="10" fill="#FFD700"/>
</svg>

<svg width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <!-- Clock face -->
  <circle cx="256" cy="256" r="200" fill="none" stroke="black" stroke-width="10"/>
  <!-- Center dot -->
  <circle cx="256" cy="256" r="10" fill="black"/>
  <!-- Hour markers -->
  <!-- 12 o'clock -->
  <line x1="256" y1="56" x2="256" y2="36" stroke="black" stroke-width="5"/>
  <!-- 3 o'clock -->
  <line x1="456" y1="256" x2="476" y2="256" stroke="black" stroke-width="5"/>
  <!-- 6 o'clock -->
  <line x1="256" y1="456" x2="256" y2="476" stroke="black" stroke-width="5"/>
  <!-- 9 o'clock -->
  <line x1="56" y1="256" x2="36" y2="256" stroke="black" stroke-width="5"/>

  <!-- Clock hands -->
  <!-- Minute hand (pointing to 12) -->
  <line x1="256" y1="256" x2="256" y2="76" stroke="black" stroke-width="8"/>
  <!-- Hour hand (pointing to 3) -->
  <line x1="256" y1="256" x2="396" y2="256" stroke="black" stroke-width="12"/>
</svg>

<svg width="512" height="512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <rect width="512" height="512" fill="#1a1a1a"/>

  <!-- Scattered circles -->
  <circle cx="100" cy="100" r="40" fill="#FF0000" opacity="0.8"/>
  <circle cx="400" cy="150" r="25" fill="#FFFF00" opacity="0.7"/>
  <circle cx="250" cy="300" r="50" fill="#0000FF" opacity="0.9"/>
  <circle cx="50" cy="400" r="30" fill="#00FF00" opacity="0.6"/>
  <circle cx="450" cy="450" r="35" fill="#FFA500" opacity="0.8"/>
  <circle cx="150" cy="250" r="20" fill="#800080" opacity="0.7"/>
  <circle cx="350" cy="100" r="30" fill="#00FFFF" opacity="0.8"/>
  <circle cx="200" cy="450" r="40" fill="#FF00FF" opacity="0.6"/>
  <circle cx="300" cy="50" r="22" fill="#FF4500" opacity="0.7"/>
  <circle cx="50" cy="200" r="38" fill="#DA70D6" opacity="0.8"/>
  <circle cx="180" cy="180" r="33" fill="#FF6347" opacity="0.7"/>
  <circle cx="380" cy="380" r="28" fill="#FFD700" opacity="0.8"/>

  <!-- Scattered squares -->
  <rect x="50" y="150" width="50" height="50" fill="#FF0000" opacity="0.7"/>
  <rect x="300" y="200" width="40" height="40" fill="#FFFF00" opacity="0.8"/>
  <rect x="400" y="300" width="60" height="60" fill="#0000FF" opacity="0.6"/>
  <rect x="100" y="350" width="30" height="30" fill="#00FF00" opacity="0.9"/>
  <rect x="200" y="50" width="45" height="45" fill="#FFA500" opacity="0.7"/>
  <rect x="450" y="200" width="35" height="35" fill="#800080" opacity="0.8"/>
  <rect x="150" y="500" width="28" height="28" fill="#00FFFF" opacity="0.7"/>
  <rect x="380" y="400" width="42" height="42" fill="#FF00FF" opacity="0.6"/>
  <rect x="120" y="280" width="55" height="55" fill="#4682B4" opacity="0.7"/>
  <rect x="320" y="120" width="48" height="48" fill="#20B2AA" opacity="0.8"/>

  <!-- Scattered triangles -->
  <polygon points="200,100 230,150 170,150" fill="#FF0000" opacity="0.8"/>
  <polygon points="350,350 380,400 320,400" fill="#FFFF00" opacity="0.7"/>
  <polygon points="50,250 80,300 20,300" fill="#0000FF" opacity="0.9"/>
  <polygon points="400,50 430,100 370,100" fill="#00FF00" opacity="0.6"/>
  <polygon points="250,400 280,450 220,450" fill="#FFA500" opacity="0.8"/>
  <polygon points="100,50 130,100 70,100" fill="#800080" opacity="0.7"/>
  <polygon points="450,250 480,300 420,300" fill="#00FFFF" opacity="0.8"/>

  <!-- Jagged lines and dots -->
